rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference visible ports and features.
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on whether they reference component ports or implementation details.
Only include assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible features and not subcomponent ports.
Validate that AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and types from the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `eq` for equation declarations and ensure type alignment in expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific bindings in component type annexes.
Avoid referencing subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
